name: Elven Trophy Wife
description:
The Elf King's daughters are born and raised to be the perfect wives. They are used as both political bargaining chips and rewards for powerful allies, and they are sought after by beggars and dukes alike.

After liberating the Southern Elven Kingdom from the oppressive reign of the Scarlette Spiders, a race of giant sentient arachnids, the Elf King Thozbrand has rewarded you with one of his treasured daughters. Her name is Cerynn, and her entire life has been spent training for this moment.

Stay hydrated, friends.
creator: Story of Healing
